metadata.demo_note: Curated CLUTRR-venue subset of iter-8 experiment_2 (query-side verifier vs no-derivation certificate). Each row carries the cached per-method predictions from the original run; the demo recomputes the fraction-caught crux table and the certificate-necessity verdict from these predictions -- NO new LLM calls.

published_full_pool_fraction_caught.fabrication_def: absent pair, raw LLM committed a relation
